request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. Critics claim we're overcommitted, but the reality is our partners share the burden more than you'd think. Remember the 2024 Baltic exercise? Local forces handled 62% of operations while we provided air cover. That's real burden-sharing. Cutting back now would leave us vulnerable. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
